description: Elegy monorepo release catalog. Each surface is identified by name and kind; CLI surfaces build from `package` when present, otherwise from the surface name.

surfaces.name: elegy-contracts
surfaces.description: Contract export, validation, and project inspection CLI.

surfaces.name: elegy-doc-practices
surfaces.description: Documentation practices skill for ADR/spec doctrine and docs config validation.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory
surfaces.description: Memory CLI with embeddings and retrieval.

surfaces.name: elegy-opencode-workers
surfaces.description: Supervised read-only OpenCode workers for Codex.

surfaces.name: elegy-obsidian
surfaces.description: Obsidian vault bridge skill for read/write/search against local Obsidian vaults.

surfaces.name: elegy-run
surfaces.description: MCP stdio host for running Elegy as an agent server.

surfaces.name: elegy-skill-authoring
surfaces.description: Portable agent skill authoring skill for creating and refining SKILL.md files.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory-mcp-stdio
surfaces.description: MCP stdio transport adapter for the memory plugin.

surfaces.name: elegy-memory-mcp-http
surfaces.description: MCP HTTP transport adapter for the memory plugin.
